blocks.content: Ms. Barrett was mid-sentence when Crystal raised her hand.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Can I — sorry. I want to go back to something from yesterday. About the narrator not being able to ask for things.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I think he can. I think he knows exactly what he wants. He just decides not to want it out loud. Because wanting something out loud means it might not happen.
The room did that quiet thing again. The one that happens when someone says a true thing in public.
She looked at me after she said it.
Just for a second. Just long enough.
